arts.ttl: Taylor Swift set to declare her allegiance to Barcelona over Real Madrid
arts.sum: These shirts have sold at incredibly high prices and been hugely popular with fans across the world, as well as presumably bringing in a lot of money with the deal itself. The news of Swift on the red and blue shirt might come as something of a surprise to Real Madrid fans, who were in their typically huge numbers when Taylor Swift played two consecutive nights at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu last year .

arts.ttl: Taylor Swift Favorite to Appear on Barcelona Jersey for Real Madrid El Clasico
arts.sum: Reports indicate Taylor Swift is the favorite to appear on Barcelona's jersey for their upcoming El Clásico against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Why Flick has called up Araujo despite ruling defender out of Barca vs Osasuna
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has included Ronald Araujo in his squad to face Osasuna in La Liga on Thursday night despite making it clear at his pre-match press conference the defender won’t play. Despite long flight and manager’s plan to let him rest, Araujo wanted to be called up to help the team.

arts.ttl: Barcelona welcome surprise star back from international duty for Osasuna game
arts.sum: Barcelona welcome centre-back Ronald Araujo back to the squad to face Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Newcastle transfer news: Barcelona suffer crushing blow in pursuit of 24-year-old midfielder
arts.sum: Barcelona reportedly suffer a major blow in their pursuit of Newcastle United midfielder Sandro Tonali ahead of the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona contact Tonali amid speculation of Milan comeback
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali’s camp has been informed that Barcelona are monitoring the Italy and Newcastle star...

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick has good news for Gavi ahead of Barca’s run-in
arts.sum: Barcelona midfielder Gavi seems to have lost prominence in recent weeks after making a successful comeback from a serious knee injury. The Barcelona boss and his staff had previously designed a plan for Gavi and did not expect him to feel 100% again after his return until the end of March.

arts.ttl: The squad for Barça v Osasuna
arts.sum: The rescheduled fixture appeared to come too soon for some players, however, which was the case for both Ronald Araujo and Raphinha, with coach Hansi Flick previously stating that they wouldn't be in the squad after the long trip back from South America so close to the game. It's also worth noting that Iñigo Martínez has been passed fit and included, and that young centre back Alexis Olmedo has been named in a first team squad for the first time.

arts.ttl: Taylor Swift close to Barcelona deal as pop superstar to feature against Real Madrid in El Clasico
arts.sum: The world famous musician is set to join the likes of Rolling Stone, Drake and Coldplay in a unique achievement

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal, Bukayo Saka, Alexander Isak & Co. - The most valuable players who could have played for an African nation
arts.sum: Some of the greatest talents across European football at this moment in time play for African nations. The likes of Mohamed Salah, Victor Osimhen and Ademola Lookman have lit up some of Europe's...
